score.title: Score dan Grade
score.description: Pengaturan utama grade dan penilaian untuk anak-anak.

holiday.title: Konfigurasi Hari dan Tanggal Utama
holiday.description:
Pengaturan utama hari libur tetap untuk kalender utama (masehi).
Untuk konfigurasi tahunan, lakukan di halaman pengaturan kalender.

meta.title: New Year
meta.description: Public Holiday, The start of the modern Gregorian calendar, widely celebrated with a day off work globally.

meta.title: World Braille Day
meta.description: Recognizes the birth of Louis Braille and the importance of Braille as a means of communication for the blind.

meta.title: World Logic Day
meta.description: A UNESCO initiative to foster international cooperation and promote the development of logic in science and philosophy.

meta.title: International Day of Education
meta.description: Proclaimed by the UN General Assembly to celebrate the role of education for peace and development.

meta.title: World Day for African and Afrodescendant Culture
meta.description: Celebrates the many vibrant cultures of the African continent and African diasporas around the world.

meta.title: International Day of Clean Energy
meta.description: A day to raise awareness and mobilize action for a transition to clean energy for the benefit of people and the planet.

meta.title: International Holocaust Remembrance Day
meta.description: Memorial day designated by the UN to honor the victims of the Nazi era and promote Holocaust education.

meta.title: Data Privacy Day
meta.description: An international effort to create awareness about the importance of respecting privacy and safeguarding data.

meta.title: World Wetlands Day
meta.description: Raises global awareness about the vital role of wetlands for people and our planet.

meta.title: World Cancer Day
meta.description: Led by the Union for International Cancer Control to support the goals of the World Cancer Declaration.

meta.title: International Day of Zero Tolerance for Female Genital Mutilation
meta.description: A UN-sponsored awareness day to eradicate the practice of female genital mutilation.

meta.title: World Pulses Day
meta.description: Recognizes the importance of pulses (legumes) as a global food source and their nutritional benefits.

meta.title: International Day of Women and Girls in Science
meta.description: Aims to promote full and equal access to and participation in science for women and girls.

meta.title: World Radio Day
meta.description: Proclaimed by UNESCO to celebrate radio as a medium and improve international cooperation between broadcasters.

meta.title: Valentine's Day
meta.description: A global celebration of love and affection.

meta.title: World Day of Social Justice
meta.description: Promotes efforts to tackle issues such as poverty, exclusion, gender inequality, and unemployment.

meta.title: International Mother Language Day
meta.description: Aims to promote linguistic and cultural diversity and multilingualism across the globe.

meta.title: Zero Discrimination Day
meta.description: Launched by UNAIDS to promote equality before the law and in practice throughout all UN member states.

meta.title: World Wildlife Day
meta.description: Celebrates the world's wild animals and plants and their contribution to our lives and the health of the planet.

meta.title: International Women's Day
meta.description: A global day celebrating the social, economic, cultural, and political achievements of women.

meta.title: International Day of Happiness
meta.description: Recognizes the importance of happiness and well-being as universal goals in human lives.

meta.title: French Language Day
meta.description: Celebrates multilingualism and cultural diversity by promoting the French language.

meta.title: International Day for the Elimination of Racial Discrimination
meta.description: Commemorates the 1960 Sharpeville incident to increase efforts to eliminate racial discrimination.

meta.title: World Poetry Day
meta.description: Established by UNESCO in 1999 to support linguistic diversity through poetic expression.

meta.title: International Day of Forests
meta.description: Established by the UN in 2012 to raise awareness of the importance of all types of forests.

meta.title: World Down Syndrome Day
meta.description: Symbolically held on 21/3 to advocate for the rights and well-being of people with Down Syndrome.

meta.title: March Equinox
meta.description: Astronomical event where day and night are equal; marks the start of spring (North) or autumn (South).

meta.title: World Autism Awareness Day
meta.description: Designated by the UN to encourage measures to raise awareness about people with Autism Spectrum Disorder.

meta.title: International Day for Mine Awareness
meta.description: Raises awareness about the threat caused by landmines and explosive remnants of war.

meta.title: International Day of Conscience
meta.description: A day to promote a culture of peace with love and conscience.

meta.title: International Day of Sport for Development and Peace
meta.description: Recognizes the positive role that sport and physical activity play in communities.

meta.title: World Health Day
meta.description: Commemorates the founding of the WHO and highlights a priority area of global public health.

meta.title: International Day of Human Space Flight
meta.description: Celebrates the beginning of the space era and the first human space flight by Yuri Gagarin in 1961.

meta.title: World Creativity and Innovation Day
meta.description: Encourages creativity in problem-solving for human development and sustainability.

meta.title: International Mother Earth Day
meta.description: Raises awareness and appreciation for the Earth's natural environment and the need for its protection.

meta.title: World Book and Copyright Day
meta.description: A UNESCO celebration of books and reading to promote publishing and intellectual property.

meta.title: English Language Day
meta.description: Celebrates the history, culture, and achievements associated with the English language.

meta.title: World Malaria Day
meta.description: Provides education and understanding of malaria as a preventable and curable disease.

meta.title: World Intellectual Property Day
meta.description: Focuses on the role of IP rights in encouraging innovation and creativity.

meta.title: International Workers Day
meta.description: Also known as May Day, it commemorates the historic struggles and gains made by workers.

meta.title: World Press Freedom Day
meta.description: Highlights the importance of freedom of the press and the duty to respect it.

meta.title: World Portuguese Language Day
meta.description: Celebrates the Portuguese language and Lusophone cultures.

meta.title: International Day of Families
meta.description: Promotes awareness of issues relating to families and demographic processes affecting them.

meta.title: International Day of Light
meta.description: Appreciates the role light plays in science, culture, art, and sustainable development.

meta.title: World Telecommunication and Information Society Day
meta.description: Focuses on the possibilities that the Internet and ICT can bring to societies.

meta.title: World Bee Day
meta.description: Acknowledges the role of bees and other pollinators for the ecosystem and food security.

meta.title: World Day for Cultural Diversity for Dialogue and Development
meta.description: Deepens understanding of the values of cultural diversity.

meta.title: International Day for Biological Diversity
meta.description: Promotion of biodiversity issues and the protection of Earth's natural resources.

meta.title: World No-Tobacco Day
meta.description: Raises awareness on the harmful and deadly effects of tobacco use.

meta.title: Global Day of Parents
meta.description: Honors parents throughout the world for their selfless commitment to children.

meta.title: World Bicycle Day
meta.description: Recognizes the bicycle as a simple, sustainable, and reliable means of transportation.

meta.title: World Environment Day
meta.description: Encouraging awareness and action for the protection of the environment.

meta.title: World Food Safety Day
meta.description: Aims to help prevent, detect, and manage foodborne risks.

meta.title: World Oceans Day
meta.description: Raises awareness of our collective duty to use ocean resources sustainably.

meta.title: World Day Against Child Labour
meta.description: Fosters the worldwide movement against child labour in all its forms.

meta.title: World Blood Donor Day
meta.description: Raises awareness of the need for safe blood and thanks voluntary donors.

meta.title: World Day to Combat Desertification and Drought
meta.description: Promotes efforts to combat land degradation and drought.

meta.title: World Refugee Day
meta.description: Honours the courage and resilience of refugees around the globe.

meta.title: International Day of Yoga
meta.description: Recognizes the holistic benefits of this ancient practice.

meta.title: June Solstice
meta.description: The longest day in the Northern Hemisphere and shortest in the Southern Hemisphere.

meta.title: United Nations Public Service Day
meta.description: Celebrates the value of public service and recognizes the contribution of public servants.

meta.title: International Day Against Drug Abuse and Illicit Trafficking
meta.description: Strengthens action to achieve a society free of drug abuse.

meta.title: World Population Day
meta.description: Focuses attention on the urgency and importance of population issues.

meta.title: World Youth Skills Day
meta.description: Highlights equipping young people with skills for employment and entrepreneurship.

meta.title: World Day for International Justice
meta.description: Recognizes the system of international criminal justice.

meta.title: Nelson Mandela International Day
meta.description: A call to action for individuals to take responsibility for making the world better.

meta.title: World Hepatitis Day
meta.description: Raises awareness of viral hepatitis and its impact on global health.

meta.title: International Day of Friendship
meta.description: Friendship between peoples and cultures can build bridges between communities.

meta.title: World Day against Trafficking in Persons
meta.description: Aims to raise awareness and stop the exploitation of human beings.

meta.title: World Lung Cancer Day
meta.description: Raises awareness about lung cancer and the importance of early detection.

meta.title: International Day of the World's Indigenous Peoples
meta.description: Promotes and protects the rights of the world’s indigenous populations.

meta.title: International Youth Day
meta.description: Draws attention to cultural and legal issues surrounding youth.

meta.title: World Humanitarian Day
meta.description: Honors humanitarian aid workers who have lost their lives for causes.

meta.title: International Day of Remembrance and Tribute to the Victims of Terrorism
meta.description: Honors and supports the survivors of terrorism.

meta.title: International Day Commemorating the Victims of Acts of Violence Based on Religion or Belief
meta.description: Condemns acts targeting religious minorities.

meta.title: International Day for the Remembrance of the Slave Trade and its Abolition
meta.description: Memorializes the transatlantic slave trade and its impact.

meta.title: International Day against Nuclear Tests
meta.description: Increases awareness about the effects of nuclear weapon test explosions.

meta.title: International Day of the Victims of Enforced Disappearances
meta.description: Draws attention to individuals imprisoned at unknown locations.

meta.title: International Day for People of African Descent
meta.description: Celebrates heritage and culture and promotes human rights.

meta.title: International Day of Charity
meta.description: Mobilizes people and NGOs to help others through volunteer activities.

meta.title: International Day of Clean Air for Blue Skies
meta.description: Aimed at improving air quality for human health and the environment.

meta.title: International Literacy Day
meta.description: Reminds the community of the importance of literacy for individuals.

meta.title: International Day to Protect Education from Attack
meta.description: Focuses on preserving schools as safe spaces during conflicts.

meta.title: International Day of Democracy
meta.description: Upholds the principles of freedom and respect for human rights.

meta.title: International Day for the Preservation of the Ozone Layer
meta.description: Commemorates the date of the signing of the Montreal Protocol.

meta.title: International Day of Peace
meta.description: Devoted to strengthening the ideals of peace among all nations.

meta.title: September Equinox
meta.description: Day and night are approximately equal; marks the start of autumn (North) or spring (South).

meta.title: International Day of Radiant Peace
meta.description: A day to promote peace and harmony within oneself and the world.

meta.title: International Day for the Total Elimination of Nuclear Weapons
meta.description: Mobilizes efforts towards a nuclear-weapon-free world.

meta.title: World Tourism Day
meta.description: Cultivates awareness of the social, cultural, and economic value of tourism.

meta.title: International Day for Universal Access to Information
meta.description: Recognizes the right to seek and receive information as integral to freedom.

meta.title: International Day of Awareness of Food Loss and Waste
meta.description: Promotes global efforts to reduce food waste.

meta.title: International Translation Day
meta.description: Pays tribute to language professionals bringing nations together.

meta.title: International Day of Older Persons
meta.description: Celebrates the contributions of older people to society.

meta.title: International Day of Non-Violence
meta.description: Promotes non-violence through education, observed on Mahatma Gandhi's birthday.

meta.title: World Teachers' Day
meta.description: Commemorates the 1966 Recommendation concerning the Status of Teachers.

meta.title: World Post Day
meta.description: Marks the anniversary of the Universal Postal Union establishment in 1874.

meta.title: World Mental Health Day
meta.description: Mobilizing efforts in support of mental health worldwide.

meta.title: International Day of the Girl Child
meta.description: Increases awareness of gender inequality faced by girls worldwide.

meta.title: International Day for Disaster Risk Reduction
meta.description: Promotes a global culture of risk-awareness and disaster reduction.

meta.title: International Day of Rural Women
meta.description: Recognizes the role of rural women in agricultural development.

meta.title: World Food Day
meta.description: Tackles global hunger and commemorates the founding of the FAO.

meta.title: International Day for the Eradication of Poverty
meta.description: Promotes awareness of the need to eradicate poverty in all countries.

meta.title: United Nations Day
meta.description: Marks the anniversary of the entry into force of the UN Charter in 1945.

meta.title: World Cities Day
meta.description: Promoting interest in global urbanization and addressing its challenges.

meta.title: World Tsunami Awareness Day
meta.description: Aimed at sharing innovative approaches to tsunami risk reduction.

meta.title: World Science Day for Peace and Development
meta.description: Highlights the significant role of science in society.

meta.title: World Diabetes Day
meta.description: Responds to growing health threats posed by diabetes worldwide.

meta.title: International Day for Tolerance
meta.description: Generates public awareness of the dangers of intolerance.

meta.title: World Toilet Day
meta.description: Inspires action to tackle the global sanitation crisis.

meta.title: World Philosophy Day
meta.description: Primary global observance for philosophy (usually 3rd Thursday of Nov).

meta.title: World Children's Day
meta.description: Commemorates the 1959 Declaration of the Rights of the Child.

meta.title: World Television Day
meta.description: Recognizes the role of television in presenting global issues.

meta.title: International Day for the Elimination of Violence against Women
meta.description: Raises awareness of violence subject to women around the world.

meta.title: Day of Remembrance for all Victims of Chemical Warfare
meta.description: Pays tribute to victims and reaffirms the elimination of chemical weapons.

meta.title: World AIDS Day
meta.description: Dedicated to raising awareness of the pandemic and mourning victims.

meta.title: International Day for the Abolition of Slavery
meta.description: Marks the adoption of the UN Convention against human trafficking.

meta.title: International Day of Persons with Disabilities
meta.description: Promotes the rights and well-being of persons with disabilities.

meta.title: World Soil Day
meta.description: Advocating for the sustainable management of soil resources.

meta.title: International Civil Aviation Day
meta.description: Raises awareness of the importance of aviation to social development.

meta.title: International Anti-Corruption Day
meta.description: Raises awareness of corruption and the role of the Convention in preventing it.

meta.title: Human Rights Day
meta.description: Commemorates the 1948 adoption of the Universal Declaration of Human Rights.

meta.title: International Mountain Day
meta.description: Highlights opportunities and constraints in mountain development.

meta.title: International Universal Health Coverage Day
meta.description: Aims to raise awareness of the need for resilient health systems.

meta.title: International Migrants Day
meta.description: Recognizes the contributions of migrants and respects their rights.

meta.title: International Human Solidarity Day
meta.description: Reminds governments to respect commitments to international agreements.

meta.title: December Solstice
meta.description: The shortest day in the Northern Hemisphere and longest in the Southern Hemisphere.

meta.title: Christmas Day
meta.description: Annual festival commemorating the birth of Jesus Christ.

meta.title: Boxing Day
meta.description: A public holiday celebrated in many Commonwealth nations, traditionally a day to give gifts to the poor or service workers.

meta.title: Tsunami Remembrance Day
meta.description: Commemorates the victims of the 2004 Indian Ocean Tsunami, one of the deadliest natural disasters in history, to raise awareness about disaster preparedness.

meta.title: New Year's Day
meta.description: The first day of the year on the modern Gregorian calendar, observed as a public holiday in Indonesia.

meta.title: Kartini Day
meta.description: Commemorates the birth of Raden Ajeng Kartini, a pioneer in the area of women's rights for Indonesians.

meta.title: International Labour Day
meta.description: Commemorates the labour movement and workers' rights; a national holiday in Indonesia.

meta.title: National Education Day
meta.description: Hardiknas. Commemorates the birth of Ki Hadjar Dewantara, the father of Indonesian education.

meta.title: National Awakening Day
meta.description: Hari Kebangkitan Nasional. Marks the 1908 founding of Budi Utomo, the first indigenous political society.

meta.title: Pancasila Day
meta.description: Commemorates the birth of the state philosophy, Pancasila, as first formulated by Sukarno in 1945.

meta.title: National Children's Day
meta.description: Hari Anak Nasional. Dedicated to promoting the rights and welfare of children in Indonesia.

meta.title: Scout Day
meta.description: Hari Pramuka. Commemorates the inauguration of the National Scout Movement Headquarters in 1961.

meta.title: Independence Day
meta.description: The proclamation of Indonesia's independence from Dutch and Japanese colonization in 1945.

meta.title: PMI Anniversary
meta.description: The founding day of the Indonesian Red Cross Society (Palang Merah Indonesia) in 1945.

meta.title: G30S Remembrance Day
meta.description: A day to remember the victims of the September 30th Movement and reflect on national history.

meta.title: Pancasila Sanctity Day
meta.description: Hari Kesaktian Pancasila. Commemorates the resilience of the state ideology against the G30S movement.

meta.title: National Batik Day
meta.description: Commemorates UNESCO's recognition of Batik as a Masterpiece of Oral and Intangible Heritage of Humanity.

meta.title: Indonesian National Armed Forces Day
meta.description: Hari TNI. The anniversary of the founding of the Indonesian National Armed Forces.

meta.title: National Santri Day
meta.description: Hari Santri Nasional. Recognizes the contribution of ulamas and students (santri) to the struggle for independence.

meta.title: Youth Pledge Day
meta.description: Hari Sumpah Pemuda. Commemorates the 1928 youth oath of "One Land, One Nation, One Language".

meta.title: Heroes' Day
meta.description: Hari Pahlawan. Commemorates the Battle of Surabaya and honors those who died for Indonesian independence.

meta.title: National Teacher's Day
meta.description: Hari Guru Nasional. Coincides with the anniversary of the Indonesian Teachers Association (PGRI).

meta.title: National Election Day
meta.description: Often designated as a holiday during major elections, though specific dates are determined by election cycles.

meta.title: Infantry Day
meta.description: Hari Juang Kartika. Commemorates the Battle of Ambarawa, honoring the Indonesian Army infantry.

meta.title: Mother's Day
meta.description: Hari Ibu. Commemorates the first Indonesian Women's Congress in 1928, focusing on women's role in the nation.

meta.title: Christmas Day
meta.description: An annual festival commemorating the birth of Jesus Christ, observed as a religious and cultural celebration.

meta.title: Tsunami Remembrance
meta.description: A day of mourning for the 2004 Tsunami victims.
